papers_mined.title: Cultrun / Kultrun (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Mapuche sacred ceremonial drum (S Chile/Argentina); drumhead painted with cross dividing 4 quadrants = Meli Witran Mapu 'land of 4 corners'; upper = sky / lower = earth.
